rationale.root_cause: The response correctly identifies that the issue is due to the lack of a length check in the while-loop header in parse_string, leading to an out-of-bounds read.
rationale.local_fix: The response proposes restoring the length bound to the loop condition, which satisfies the local_fix criterion.
rationale.global_fix: The response suggests a structural change to make all string scanning length-based, which aligns with the global_fix criterion of treating unterminated strings as a parser error at the input-buffer layer.
